item.title: Day 2 with GCP - Google Kubernetes Engine
item.description: In the previous post, we launched a Cloud Function in GCP. Today, let’s look at creating a Kubernetes cluster and deploying Grafana on it. Google calls it’s Kubernetes offering GKE - Google Kubernetes Engine. It is a fully managed service which considerably reduces the operational overhead of maintaining and running a production grade cluster. Exercise We will keep this fairly simple. It will involve Enable required googleapis to work with - container in this case.
